issues.reason: 'выведи результат' is standard beginner phrasing. Students only have print() available at this stage, so the expected action is unambiguous. Clarifying is a style preference, not a defect.
issues.suggested_fix: Clearly specify what should be displayed

issues.current_text: Создай функцию add(a, b), которая возвращает сумму двух чисел. Выведи результат вызова add(7, 8).
issues.reason: 'выведи результат' is standard beginner phrasing. Students only have print() available at this stage, so the expected action is unambiguous. Clarifying is a style preference, not a defect.
